description: Self-custody-slot wrapped Bitcoin on tacit. Each cBTC.zk note is backed 1:1 by sats locked at a key-path P2TR output whose internal key is derivable only from the note's r_leaf scalar. Mint, redeem, and transfer are trustless single-Bitcoin-tx operations: no federation, no oracle threshold, no co-signer at any step. Privacy follows tacit's shielded-pool model — every operation is a mixer op, so the on-chain link between mint and redeem is broken by the anonymity set within each denomination tier. The structural cost of full self-custody: lost notes lock the backing sats permanently, same property native Bitcoin already has.
name: tacBTC
